1.description: get Trondheim municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: inspect distinct quick-clay risk class values in utlosningomr

3.description: select quick-clay hazard polygons filtered by the high risk class value returned by step 2

4.description: select buildings in Trondheim municipality using kommunenummer from step 1

5.description: reduce quick-clay polygons from step 3 to Trondheim extent (intersects municipal geometry from step 1)

6.description: find buildings from step 4 that intersect reduced quick-clay polygons from step 5

7.description: compute Trondheim municipality centroid from step 1

8.description: compute distance from each affected building (step 6) to municipality centroid (step 7)

9.description: collapse to one row per building with minimum distance_m

10.description: sort buildings by distance asc and limit to 10 closest

1.sql: SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%trondheim%';

1.description: get Trondheim kommunenummer, boundary and centroid

2.description: find maximum skredrisikokvikkleireklasse (highest risk class) in quick-clay areas

3.description: select quick-clay polygons with the highest risk class

4.description: reduce quick-clay polygons to those within Trondheim municipality (intersection)

6.description: find buildings that intersect the reduced quick-clay polygons

7.description: compute distance from intersecting buildings to municipality centroid

8.description: collapse to one row per building using MIN(distance_m) as distance_m

1.sql: SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade, ST_Centroid(omrade) AS centroid FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%trondheim%';

1.description: get Trondheim municipality geometry and centroid

2.description: select quick-clay hazard polygons with the highest risk class (national) using MAX() subquery

3.description: reduce selected hazard polygons to Trondheim municipality extent (intersects)

4.description: get buildings in Trondheim municipality (filter by kommunenummer)

5.description: find buildings that intersect the reduced quick-clay hazard polygons

6.description: compute distance from each intersecting building to the municipality centroid

7.description: collapse to one row per building using MIN(distance_m) to handle duplicates

8.description: sort buildings by ascending distance to centroid

replan_trigger.error: Step 3 is planned as 'spatial_join', but was attempted as 'query'. Produce a new plan or execute the planned action.
